identity: Human female pyromancer, fiery orange-red hair flowing with ember trails and sparks, glowing amber eyes, fair skin with faint soot smudges, slim tall build.
outfit: Orange-red layered robes with flame-pattern embroidery, gold sash at the waist, exposed forearms, a ragged scorched hem. Dark leather sandals. A short cape of flickering red-and-orange fabric.
weapons: No held weapon. Both hands wreathed in bright orange-red flames as her "weapon".
attackStyle: East-facing. Right arm thrust forward, a jet of orange-red fire erupting from the open palm. Hair whips back with heat-wind.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands raised with a large swirling ball of orange-red fire hovering between them. Embers rain upward.
blockStyle: East-facing. Arms crossed in front of chest with a wall of flickering flames between her and the camera-right edge.
koStyle: East-facing, slumped forward on one knee, flame on hands extinguished to faint embers. Hair dulled.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), fiery idle. Both palms held at waist level with small flames dancing above them. Fiery hair.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Fiery hair with ember trails, glowing amber eyes, flame-embroidered orange robes.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human female pyromancer, fiery orange-red hair flowing with ember trails and sparks, glowing amber eyes, fair skin with faint soot smudges, slim tall build.

OUTFIT: Orange-red layered robes with flame-pattern embroidery, gold sash at the waist, exposed forearms, a ragged scorched hem. Dark leather sandals. A short cape of flickering red-and-orange fabric.

WEAPONS: No held weapon. Both hands wreathed in bright orange-red flames as her "weapon".

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female pyromancer, fiery orange-red hair flowing with ember trails and sparks, glowing amber eyes, fair skin with faint soot smudges, slim tall build.

OUTFIT: Orange-red layered robes with flame-pattern embroidery, gold sash at the waist, exposed forearms, a ragged scorched hem. Dark leather sandals. A short cape of flickering red-and-orange fabric.

WEAPONS: No held weapon. Both hands wreathed in bright orange-red flames as her "weapon".

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Fiery hair with ember trails, glowing amber eyes, flame-embroidered orange robes.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
